# StdioClientTransportOptions.Launcher property

A factory that launches a fresh child. REQUIRED to enable restart-on-unexpected-exit (R-8.6.4-a); when provided and [`Child`](./Child.md) is omitted, the first child is launched immediately.

```csharp
public ChildProcessLauncher? Launcher { get; set; }
```
